summary: Live-applied ADR 0330 on `codex/ws-0330-main-closeout` by making the committed controller-local secret contract repo-relative, teaching repo automation to resolve `.local/...` paths correctly from a worktree or the shared repo root, adding fork-first example inventory/provider/publication/controller-secret surfaces plus public reference documentation, regenerating the ADR and discovery entrypoints, and re-verifying the branch-local exact-main tree while deliberately deferring protected canonical-truth surfaces to the final mainline integration step.

verification.check: Focused repo-relative secret and public reference regression slice
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_controller_automation_toolkit.py tests/test_config_merge_windmill.py tests/test_ntfy_publish.py tests/test_public_reference_samples.py` returned `64 passed in 6.07s`, covering repo-relative controller-secret resolution plus public reference sample parsing and leak guards, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-targeted-tests-r1-0.178.3.txt`.

verification.check: Registry, discovery, ADR, and topology generator refresh
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/workstream_registry.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_discovery_artifacts.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_adr_index.py --write`, and `python3 scripts/generate_topology_snapshot.py --write` all completed successfully after the active workstream metadata was corrected to claim the generated ADR shards and topology snapshot, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-workstream-registry-r2.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-workstream-registry-r3.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-discovery-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-adr-index-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-topology-snapshot-r1.txt`.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces` passed after the workstream ownership manifest was expanded to include the ADR shard outputs and topology snapshot freshness surface, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-branch-validate-r1.txt`.

`LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` reports repository version `0.178.3`, platform version `0.130.98`, and a blocked release cut because unrelated `controller_dependency_gap` waivers remain open through `2026-04-06`; `LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py --bump patch --dry-run` shows the next candidate version would be `0.178.4`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-release-status-r1.json` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-release-dry-run-r1.txt`.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces generated-docs` reduced to the expected integration-only drift on `changelog.md`, because canonical truth must be assembled from the protected exact-main tree after the workstream is merged rather than from the branch-local live-apply branch, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-validate-repo-r2.txt`.
`git diff --check` passed on the receiptless implementation tree before the receipt commit, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-git-diff-check-r2.txt`.

`uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate` passed after adding the ADR 0330 branch-local receipt, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-branch-live-apply-receipts-r1.txt`.

notes: This is a branch-local live-apply receipt for a repo-only ADR closeout; it intentionally leaves `README.md`, `changelog.md`, `VERSION`, and `versions/stack.yaml` untouched until the protected exact-main integration step.

Because ADR 0330 and its follow-on ADRs are repository-only control-plane changes, the live platform version remains `0.130.98` and no platform version bump should accompany this branch-local implementation commit.
Exact-main integration should start with a fresh `git fetch origin main` because concurrent work may advance `origin/main` before the protected canonical-truth refresh and push.
